v1.0.2 — Latest Release v1.0.2 — 最新版本

ZenFile

A beautifully crafted, open-source file manager and offline media center for Android. Built with Flutter for极致 performance and stunning glassmorphism aesthetics.

一款精美绝伦的开源文件管理器和离线媒体中心。基于 Flutter 构建，拥有极致性能和惊艳的毛玻璃美学。

Source Code 源代码 Download 下载
What's New in v1.0.2 v1.0.2 更新亮点

Reimagined Navigation Experience

重新定义导航体验

v1.0.2 brings a revolutionary dual-finger gesture system, a refined compact UI, and dozens of optimizations that make file management feel effortless.

v1.0.2 带来了革命性的双指手势系统、精简紧凑的界面和数十项优化，让文件管理变得前所未有的流畅。

👆👆

Dual-Finger Gesture Navigation

双指手势导航

Swipe with two fingers to seamlessly switch between Category, Browse, and Drawer pages. No more accidental back-gesture conflicts — a first on Android file managers.

双指左右滑动即可在分类页、浏览页和抽屉页之间无缝切换。彻底告别误触返回手势的困扰——Android 文件管理器首创。

📐

Ultra-Compact Interface

极致紧凑界面

Breadcrumb bar, tab bar, and dual-pane headers are all significantly slimmed down — reclaiming up to 30% more screen space for your files.

面包屑路径栏、标签栏和双窗口头部全面精简——为文件列表腾出多达30%的屏幕空间。

⭕

Elegant Ring Progress Indicator

优雅圆环进度条

File operations now display a sleek circular progress ring with percentage at center — consistent across single-window, dual-pane, local, and remote browsing.

文件操作时显示精致的圆环线条进度条，中心显示百分比数字——在单窗口、双窗口、本地和远程浏览中保持一致。

🌐

Cross-Platform Remote Path Fix

跨平台远程路径修复

Fixed a critical path parsing bug on Windows that caused drag-and-drop misbehavior with remote servers (WebDAV/FTP/SFTP). Full POSIX path compatibility ensured.

修复了 Windows 平台上远程服务器（WebDAV/FTP/SFTP）路径解析错误导致拖放异常的关键问题，确保完整的 POSIX 路径兼容性。

14
Improvements in v1.0.2
v1.0.2 优化项
6
Remote Protocols
远程协议支持
5
App Icon Styles
应用图标风格
∞
Open Source & Free
开源免费
Core Features 核心功能

Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't

应有尽有，简洁不凡

ZenFile combines powerful file management with a built-in media center — all wrapped in a gorgeous glassmorphism design.

ZenFile 将强大的文件管理与内置媒体中心融为一体——全部包裹在精美的毛玻璃设计之中。

📁

Dual-Pane File Browser

双面板文件浏览器

Browse two directories side-by-side and transfer files effortlessly between panes.

并排浏览两个目录，在面板之间轻松传输文件。

🏷️

Multi-Tab Support

多标签页支持

Open multiple folders in separate tabs for quick navigation without losing your place.

在单独的标签页中打开多个文件夹，快速导航而不丢失当前位置。

🎬

Built-in Media Player

内置媒体播放器

High-performance video player powered by media_kit, elegant audio player with album art, and pinch-to-zoom image viewer.

基于 media_kit 驱动的高性能视频播放器，带专辑封面的优雅音频播放器，以及双指缩放图片查看器。

☁️

Remote Server Connections

远程服务器连接

Connect to FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, and SMB/LAN servers. Manage cloud files as if they were local.

支持 FTP、SFTP、WebDAV 和 SMB/局域网连接，像管理本地文件一样管理云端文件。

🔒

Encrypted File Vault

文件加密保险柜

Protect sensitive files with built-in encryption. Your private data stays private.

内置加密功能保护敏感文件。您的隐私数据始终安全。

✏️

Built-in Text Editor

内置文本编辑器

View and edit .txt, .md, .json and other code files directly within the app.

直接在应用内查看和编辑 .txt、.md、.json 等代码文件。

Tech Stack 技术栈

Built with Modern Technologies

基于现代技术构建

💙

Flutter & Dart

Cross-platform UI framework

跨平台 UI 框架

🎬

media_kit

High-performance media engine

高性能媒体引擎

📦

Provider

Reactive state management

响应式状态管理
